title: Settings page
summary: Multi-section settings screen with grouped cards, labeled form fields, toggles, and a save action per section.
brief: Build a settings page grouped into cards (profile, notifications, security) with text inputs, a select, and switches. Each section has its own save button.

steps.reason: Visual grouping for each settings section
Divider between card header and body

checklist.check: Save button is disabled until the section's form is dirty.
Binary settings use Switch, not Checkbox (Switch = immediate effect).
[Card] Avoid: Nesting cards
[Card] Avoid: Using Card when a simple div with border would suffice
[Card] Avoid: Forgetting CardContent padding when placing forms inside
[Card] A11y: Card is a div by default. Add role='region' and aria-label for landmark cards. CardTitle renders h3 — ensure heading hierarchy.
[Separator] Avoid: Using as spacing instead of semantic separation
[Separator] Avoid: Forgetting orientation='vertical' needs parent height
[Separator] A11y: Set decorative=false if the separator conveys semantic meaning. Radix handles role='separator'.
[Form] Avoid: Forgetting to spread {...field} into the form control (connects value/onChange)
[Form] Avoid: Putting FormLabel outside FormItem (loses htmlFor wiring)
[Form] Avoid: Using useForm without a resolver when zod validation is desired
[Form] Avoid: Calling form.handleSubmit without a callback

[Form] A11y: FormControl automatically wires id, aria-describedby, and aria-invalid. FormLabel uses htmlFor matching the control id. Errors are announced via FormMessage with matching aria-describedby.
[Label] Avoid: Forgetting to set htmlFor matching the input's id
[Label] Avoid: Using Label for non-form text content
[Label] Avoid: Nesting interactive elements inside Label
[Label] A11y: Clicking the label focuses the associated control. Automatically communicates the label to screen readers. Use htmlFor/id pairing, not nesting.
[Input] Avoid: Missing associated Label element for accessibility
[Input] Avoid: Using type='number' without min/max constraints
[Input] Avoid: Not providing placeholder text for context
[Input] A11y: Always pair with a Label using htmlFor/id. Consider aria-describedby for helper text or error messages.
[Select] Avoid: Missing Label pairing
[Select] Avoid: Forgetting SelectValue inside SelectTrigger
[Select] Avoid: Using Select when the list is large (use Combobox)
[Select] Avoid: Putting non-SelectItem children inside SelectContent
[Select] A11y: Full keyboard nav: arrow keys, Home, End, typeahead, Escape to close. Radix handles role='combobox' on trigger, role='listbox' on content, aria-selected on items.
[Switch] Avoid: Using for form fields that need explicit submit
[Switch] Avoid: Missing Label
[Switch] A11y: Always pair with Label. Radix handles role='switch' and aria-checked.
[Button] Avoid: Using 'destructive' variant for non-destructive actions
[Button] Avoid: Nesting interactive elements inside asChild button
[Button] Avoid: Missing aria-label when using icon-only size='icon' variant
[Button] Avoid: Using onClick for navigation instead of asChild with a link
[Button] A11y: Automatically handles focus ring, disabled state, and aria attributes. Icon-only buttons MUST have aria-label. Loading state automatically sets disabled.
